untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) Support/resistance level identification and testing count (no indicator provided for structural S/R detection or test counting); (2) Multi-timeframe confluence analysis (backtest engine operates on single timeframe); (3) Price pullback pattern recognition (requires pattern matching beyond allowed operators); (4) Major swing high/low identification over historical lookback (requires swing detection logic not available); (5) Specific threshold parameters marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are undefined and critical to implementation. The rule is qualitative and pattern-based, requiring custom indicators for structural level detection that are not in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal describes a sophisticated S/R breakout strategy but cannot be fully operationalized with the available indicators. It requires: (a) structural S/R detection algorithms, (b) level testing counters, (c) multi-timeframe analysis capability, and (d) swing/pattern recognition beyond basic price/volume/oscillator indicators. Provided placeholder uses Pivot levels (s1/r1) as a crude proxy for S/R, but this does not capture the core logic of 'significant levels tested multiple times.' All [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters must be empirically defined before backtesting.
